title: Home
excerpt: Notebooker keeps everything you collect - and answers questions about it, reads it aloud as podcasts, and turns it into study material. Built in the open, on your own keys and storage.
content_html:
Your keys · Your storage · Your data

Turn what you save
into what you know.

Notebooker keeps everything you collect - and answers questions about it, reads it aloud as podcasts, and turns it into study material. Built in the open, on your own keys and storage.

From your notebook

"My saved articles disagree about caffeine and sleep - who's actually right?"

Two of your three sources agree it's the timing, not the dose: caffeine's half-life means an afternoon cutoff matters more than how much you drink. Sources: ¹ ² ³

▶ View the demo notebook - no signup

01 - Collect

Links, PDFs, audio, video. From your browser, phone, or any app that can send a webhook.

02 - Ask

Chat with a notebook and get cited answers. Full-text search across everything you've saved.

03 - Transform

Podcasts, flashcards, mindmaps, textbooks - generated from your sources, not the internet.

What it does with what you save

No dashboards to maintain, no folders to tidy. You save; Notebooker makes it useful.

Cited answers, not vibes

Ask a question and every claim links back to the exact source you saved - plus a coverage meter showing how many of the documents it consulted actually made it into the answer.

Your reading list, as radio

Turn a page or a whole notebook into a podcast in the format you're in the mood for - deep dive, quick brief, frank critique, two-sided debate, or unabridged walkthrough. Subscribe with a private RSS feed in any player.

Study material on demand

Flashcards with real spaced repetition (and Anki export), charts, mindmaps, infographics, even full textbooks - built from your sources in a click.

A professor, a critic, a debater

Built-in personas read your sources the way you need - Professor teaches it, Critic stress-tests it, Debate argues both sides, Beginner's Guide starts from zero.

Feeds that fill your library

Watch any RSS feed or YouTube channel and new posts become sources automatically. Workflows and webhooks connect everything else.

A real API for your library

Save links, write notes, search, ask cited questions, and export notebooks from scripts and automations - a documented REST API with personal keys or OAuth, at docs.notebooker.ai.

Claude, meet your research

Connect Claude or any MCP client to your library over OAuth - it can search your sources, manage notebooks and notes, and answer with citations from what you've saved. No keys to paste.

Any model, your keys

OpenAI, Anthropic, or a local model - you choose what reads your notes, and you can bring your own API keys.

Your own storage

Point Notebooker at any S3-compatible bucket - R2, Spaces, AWS - and everything it stores lives with you. Export notes as Markdown or your whole library anytime.

Everywhere you are

Web app, iOS and Android, browser extensions, and native desktop apps - one library, always in sync.

Private by construction, not by promise

Most "privacy-first" claims ask you to trust a policy page. Notebooker hands you the controls instead.

-Bring your own AI keys and your own S3-compatible storage - only Notebooker AI and service usage is metered

-You choose which AI models see your data - including none of ours

-Notebooker never trains AI models on what you save

-No data sold to third parties. Take everything with you anytime.

Start with the thing you're reading right now

Free to try - no card, no setup. Save a few sources and see what comes back.

content_html_zh:
您的钥匙·您的存储·您的数据

将您保存的内容转化为您所知道的内容。

Notebooker 保留您收集的所有内容 - 并回答有关它的问题，以播客的形式大声朗读，并将其转变为学习材料。 开放式构建，使用您自己的密钥和存储。

从你的笔记本上

“我保存的文章对于咖啡因和睡眠的看法不一致——到底谁是对的？”

您的三个消息来源中的两个同意这是时间，而不是剂量：咖啡因的半衰期意味着下午的截止时间比您喝多少更重要。 资料来源： 1 2 3

▶ 查看演示笔记本 - 无需注册

01 - 收集

链接、PDF、音频、视频。 从您的浏览器、手机或任何可以发送 Webhook 的应用程序。

02 - Ask

与笔记本聊天并获取引用的答案。 对您保存的所有内容进行全文搜索。

03 - 转变

播客、抽认卡、思维导图、教科书 - 来自您的来源，而不是互联网。

它对您节省的资金有何作用

无需维护仪表板，无需整理文件夹。 您保存; Notebooker 让它很有用。

引用答案，而不是共鸣

提出问题，每个声明都会链接回您保存的确切来源 - 加上一个覆盖率计，显示它查阅的文档中有多少实际上已成为答案。

您的阅读清单，如广播

将一页或整个笔记本变成您喜欢的格式的播客 - 深入探讨、快速简短、坦率批评、双方辩论或完整演练。 在任何播放器中使用私人 RSS 源订阅。

按需学习材料

具有真实间隔重复的抽认卡（和 Anki 导出）、图表、思维导图、信息图表，甚至完整的教科书 - 只需点击一下即可从您的资源中构建。

教授、批评家、辩论家

内置角色以您需要的方式阅读您的资料 - 教授教授它，评论家对其进行压力测试，辩论双方争论，初学者指南从零开始。

充实您图书馆的提要

观看任何 RSS 源或 YouTube 频道，新帖子会自动成为来源。 工作流和 Webhooks 连接其他一切。

为您的图书馆提供真正的 API

保存链接、写笔记、搜索、提出引用的问题以及从脚本和自动化导出笔记本 - 文档化的 REST API，带有个人密钥或 OAuth，位于 docs.notebooker.ai。

克劳德，满足你的研究

通过 OAuth 将 Claude 或任何 MCP 客户端连接到您的图书馆 - 它可以搜索您的资源、管理笔记本和笔记，并使用您保存的内容进行引用进行回答。 没有要粘贴的键。

任何型号，你的钥匙

OpenAI、Anthropic 或本地模型 - 您可以选择读取笔记的内容，并且可以携带自己的 API 密钥。

您自己的存储空间

将 Notebooker 指向任何与 S3 兼容的存储桶（R2、Spaces、AWS），它存储的所有内容都与您同在。 随时将笔记导出为 Markdown 或整个图书馆。

无论你在哪里

Web 应用程序、iOS 和 Android、浏览器扩展和本机桌面应用程序 - 一个库，始终保持同步。

通过建设而非承诺实现私有化

大多数“隐私第一”声明要求您信任保单页面。 Notebooker 会将控件交给您。

- 携带您自己的 AI 密钥和您自己的 S3 兼容存储 - 仅对 Notebooker AI 和服务使用进行计量

- 您选择哪些人工智能模型可以查看您的数据 - 包括我们的数据

-Notebooker 绝不会根据您保存的内容来训练 AI 模型

- 没有数据出售给第三方。 随时随身携带一切。

从你现在正在阅读的内容开始

免费试用 - 无需卡，无需设置。 保存一些来源，看看会返回什么。
